skill_chips.source: Last War: Survival - Skill Chips Quick Start Guide by #1210 Aethernis
skill_chips.tldr: On day 82 after server launch, players unlock the Combat Boost and Drone Skill Chip Systems. Skill chips increase DEF, HP and Attack of your squad. The higher the tier level, the higher the bonus. Get full Gold Skill Chips ASAP and use purple chips to level up in Combat Boost.

skill_chips.description: Provide specific battle effects — increase DEF, HP and Attack

drone_combat_boost_exp_cards.description: Used to level up Combat Boost

skill_chip_presets.description: Placeholders for skill chips deployed in battle. Up to 4 presets unlock as you progress through Combat Boost stages.
rules: Only one preset can be assigned to a squad at a time
One preset cannot be assigned to multiple squads simultaneously

combat_boost_system.description: Levels up to enhance drone attributes and skill chip effects

strategic_priority: Get full Gold (Legendary) Skill Chips as fast as possible — this is the top priority
Use purple (Epic) chips to level up Combat Boost rather than equipping them
Farm Premium Chip Materials to craft Legendary chips in Chip Lab
Push Combat Boost to level 150 quickly to unlock Preset 2 and first chip bonus
Each Combat Boost milestone significantly increases squad power — treat it like drone leveling in importance
Chip system unlocks on day 82 — prepare materials in advance if possible
common_mistakes: Equipping purple (Epic) chips instead of using them for Combat Boost leveling
Ignoring Chip Lab crafting — 800 Premium Materials = 1 Legendary chip is very achievable
Not assigning a preset to your main squad — presets must be manually assigned
Using the same preset across multiple squads is not possible — plan accordingly
